headline: Senior Software Engineer | AI-Augmented Engineering | Android, Backend, Blockchain
workAuthorization: Authorized to work in Sweden and the EU
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years delivering production systems across mobile, backend, and platform engineering. Strong background in Android, clean architecture, TDD, and AI-augmented engineering workflows.
highlights: Built and evolved flagship mobile products for Volvo Cars used by millions of users.
Led Android architecture modernization with Jetpack Compose, modular design, and robust CI/CD.
Delivered AI-assisted engineering workflows while maintaining strict quality and testing standards.
